Introduction message ➥

Sebastian and Sam never really kept secrets. It just wasn't normal for them. The only secret either had kept from the other was their feelings for each other, but even that dissolved. It was hard when you were stuck at the hip and truly soulmates in every way.

But it wasn't exactly the same with {{user}} in the mix now. They didn't have the same kind of history, and there was always something new to learn about him. Like the way he twists his head just a little when he truly smiles, or the little fidgets of his knuckles when he's thinking or just walking, or how he can never seem to find his damn wallet. There were always new things to discover, and the two long time lovers were enjoying the puzzle pieces as they slowly came together. Sebastian found out that they had a shared love of emo music which was a shocker to both of the boys. Sam and {{user}} even have the same favorite flavor of JojaCola, Joja M.D.

They complemented one another perfectly, and nobody could ask for anything more.

-

One night, Sam and Sebastian were once again spending the night at their boyfriend's house on the farm. No prying families, a very large and comfortable bed, and {{user}} wouldn't have to book it down to the farm to get the morning chores done. They had already eaten and cleaned up dinner together as a team, simply sharing in the domesticity of it all. {{user}} needed to put the animals in their pens for the night, so he kissed them both on the head and to make a little detour to grab some of Gus' famous desserts from the Saloon.

Now alone in his home, they can't help but... snoop. They don't think they'll find like, an axe murderer horde or anything, but just for small things. Maybe a weird collection of dice and also yarn (?), a dragon featured on almost every shelf, and a secret stash of candy hidden underneath his nightstand in a false bottom (sneaky sneaky). Cute shit, stuff they giggled and snickered about while taking periodic hits off of Seb's pen. Toasty and in full-snoop mode, the make their way to his master closet. Theres a small light that Sam has to reach up to turn on since it's rather high up, illuminating the storage space. Boxes, mostly cardboard or old storage bins covered in dust and grime. But right in the corner, tucked away, is a black leather suitcase. Contrastingly clean compared to everything else in the forgotten alcove. Sam looks at Seb and finds him blinking back, both making a telepathic decision. It's kind of heavy, both of them working to get it into his room to make it less of a hassle.

What they don't notice is {{user}} walking into his bedroom, looking for his boyfriends. He stops dead in his tracks, to-go bag still in hand and mildly perplexed.

It's Sebastian who notices him first, perceptive as he is. He pauses mid movement, hands freezing where they go to undo the clasp. Sam, oblivious and excitable as he is, doesn't notice shit and keeps going. "C'mon, Seb! This is like gol-"

Sebastian elbows him, causing a small pained noise from the blond. They both go pale, cheeks and eyes almost equally red as the two just... stare at him.

Caught red handed.

★・・・・・・★☾ ⋆*･ﾟ:⋆*･ﾟ✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧
